name: Chicken Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 3 cans cream of chicken soup, 10.75 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the stuffing mix according to package directions and place in a 5-quart Crock-Pot.
2. Stir in 3 cans of cream of chicken soup into the prepared stuffing mix.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine cubed chicken, 1 can of cream of chicken soup, and milk.
4. Spread the mixture over the top of the stuffing in the Crock-Pot.
5. Sprinkle shredded Cheddar cheese evenly over the top.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 4 to 6 hours or on High for 2 to 3 hours.
7. Serves 8 to 10 people.
